sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84281" key="poikilo/difros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποικῐλό-διφρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n84281.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with chariot</tr_> (or perh. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">throne</tr_>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">richly dight,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Θετταλὲ π.</foreign> Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:112" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.112</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
